title: Food Vouchers * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Food Vouchers * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION SENIOR FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eligible seniors with vouchers that can be used at participating farm stands and markets to purchase locally grown fresh fruits and vegetables. Vouchers can be used from June 1 to November 30. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: To be eligible for the program, seniors must meet ALL of the following criteria: -Be at least 62 years old by April 1 of the current year -Be receiving either SNAP benefits and/or Medicaid on April 1 of the current year -Have income below 138% of the Federal Poverty Level in the current year -Be living in a situation where food is not provided for them Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (866) 299-3562 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION SENIOR FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM
